positive: A vibrant, abstract illustration of a glowing constellation forming a playful, whimsical bear silhouette, set against a deep navy cosmic background. The stars should be rendered as bioluminescent geometric points, and the bear should be composed of intersecting celestial ribbons and nebula swirls. Use clean, vector-art style edges with strong contrast between the neon glow and the dark space. The composition must be centered, suitable for a high-quality apparel print, with a balance of light and dark areas. Dreamy, magical, high-detail, celestial map aesthetic, synthwave, cosmic doodle.
negative: blurry, grain, noise, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, character names
